predicates.name: non-text-content-present

predicates.name: information-structure-or-relationships-conveyed-through-presentation

predicates.name: content-sequence-affects-meaning
predicates.evidence: When the sequence in which content is presented affects its meaning, a correct reading sequence can be programmatically determined.

predicates.name: instructions-for-understanding-and-operating-content-present

predicates.name: implemented-with-technology-supporting-input-purpose-identification

predicates.name: content-implemented-using-markup-languages

predicates.evidence: or distinguishing a visual element
